dialogue: *everyone watches the reconstruction counter crawl across the monitor*
Final match complete. The name is {20}.
A former officer. Brilliant, ruthless, and convinced that rules were obstacles for other people.
He helped design some of them.
That explains why the missiles know exactly where to hurt us.
Smith will not stop at bases. With us weakened, London is exposed.
We are searching every record for his current location.
And he will try to stop the search.
Target confirmed: research centre. End distance: {endDistance}.
He knows we are close. Prove he is too late.
